svg.title: Highway 38 Solutions under 250 product samples and workflow proof
svg.desc: Detailed staged screenshot style proof board showing under 250 product outputs, functional workflow proof, Gmail draft proof, tracker capture, and final approval gate. Staged demo using sample information, not customer work.
svg.text: Real-looking staged outputs. Functional workflow proof. Final Rick/user approval required before customer-facing delivery.

g.text: Jobs move with no clear process.
Sample Library loads with real output previews.
Form submits and is captured in tracker.
Gmail draft is created, not sent.

svg.text: All work is auto-prepared internally to save time and ensure consistency.
Nothing is sent to customers until Rick gives final approval.
Highway 38 Solutions | Systems. Workflows. Automation. Built for Shops.
